: End-to-end LLM cost governance layer for all DRE 3D agent invocations on Databricks.
: Four controls â€” budget caps (AI Gateway), context compaction (UC Volume snapshots),
temperature mapping per agent tier, response caching for deterministic SQL hits.
: Predictable, bounded LLM spend per domain; no runaway token usage;
deterministic SQL generation at minimum model cost.
: Cost per rule authoring session <$0.02 | cache hit rate >30% |
context compaction ratio >60% | zero idle model serving cost.
